---
title: "Jacobsville_Data_Viz"
author: "Barra Peak"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(openxlsx) # read in and export microsoft excel files
library(dplyr) # easier datatable handling
library(tidyverse) # for easier datatable handling
library(stringr) # for easier character data handling
library(tibble) # for easier datatable rearranging
library(ggplot2) # plotting
library(viridis) # viridis color maps
library(forcats) # data handling
library(ggnewscale) # adding color scales to ggplot
```

## Data visualization

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

This file creates the base plots and graphs used to construct figures in Adobe Illustrator.

```{r load clean u-pb and he data}
upb_data <- read.xlsx("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Code/GitHub/Jacobsville-Sandstone/repository_data_tables.xlsx", "U.Pb.Data", startRow = 1, fillMergedCells = T, check.names = T)
he_data <- read.xlsx("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Code/GitHub/Jacobsville-Sandstone/repository_data_tables.xlsx", "U.Th.He.Data", startRow = 1, fillMergedCells = T, check.names = T)
```
```{r load and clean Malone 2016 U-Pb data, echo = F}
malone_data <- drop_na(read.csv("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/Data/Malone_data.csv"))
malone_data <- malone_data %>%
  mutate(
    Concordant = case_when(
    Conc... < 90 ~ "No",
    Conc... > 110 ~ "No",
    .default = "Yes"
    )
  )

malone_data$Site <- str_extract(malone_data$Analysis, "[^- | ^_]+")
malone_data$Site.Factor <- as.factor(malone_data$Site)
#summary(malone_data$Site.Factor)

malone_data_comp <- malone_data %>%
  filter(Site == "Deer") %>%
  filter(Concordant == "Yes")
```
```{r combine and drop disconcordant u-pb dates, echo=FALSE}
all_data <- full_join(upb_data, he_data, by = c("Run", "Sample", "Grain")) %>%
  filter(between(Percent.Concordance, 90, 110)) %>%
  filter(Sample == "BP22-02") %>%
  mutate(ZHe.Report = case_when(Fragment == "Yes" ~ Uncorrected.Date,
                                .default = Corrected.Date)) %>%
  mutate(ZHe.Report.1s = case_when(Fragment == "Yes" ~ Uncorrected.Date.1s,
                                .default = Corrected.Date.Analytical.FT.Uncertainty.1s)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied = case_when(Fragment == "Yes" ~ "None",
                                .default = "Conventional"))
```
```{r calculate max alpha dose and uncertainty}
# decay constants in yr
L238 <- 0.00000000015512 
L235 <- 0.00000000098485
L232 <- 0.0000000000499
L147 <- (log(2)/(1.06*10^(11)))
# avogadro's number
Av <- 6.022*10^(23) # avogadro's number

all_data <- all_data %>%
  # convert concentrations to atoms (and uncertainty)
  mutate(U238.atoms.g = (0.9928*U.ppm*10^(-6)/238)*Av) %>%
  mutate(U238.a.g.u = (0.9928*U.ppm.1s*10^(-6)/238)*Av) %>%
  mutate(U235.atoms.g = (0.0072*U.ppm*10^(-6)/235)*Av) %>%
  mutate(U235.a.g.u = (0.0072*U.ppm.1s*10^(-6)/235)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Th.atoms.g = (Th.ppm*10^(-6)/232)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Th.a.g.u = (Th.ppm.1s*10^(-6)/232)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Sm.atoms.g = (Sm.ppm*10^(-6)/147)*Av) %>%
  mutate(Sm.a.g.u = (Sm.ppm.1s*10^(-6)/232)*Av) %>%
  # calculate alpha dose
  mutate(Max.Alpha.Dose = 8*U238.atoms.g*(exp(L238*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1) + 
  7*U235.atoms.g*(exp(L235*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1) + 
  6*Th.atoms.g*(exp(L232*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1) +
    Sm.atoms.g*(exp(L147*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)) %>% 
  # calculate propagated uncertainty on alpha dose
  mutate(A.u = 8*U238.atoms.g*(exp(L238*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)*
           sqrt((U238.a.g.u/U238.atoms.g)^2 + 
                  (L238*Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE/2)^2)) %>%
  mutate(B.u = 7*U235.atoms.g*(exp(L235*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)*
           sqrt((U235.a.g.u/U235.atoms.g)^2 + (L235*Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE/2)^2)) %>%
  mutate(C.u = 6*Th.atoms.g*(exp(L232*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)*
           sqrt((Th.a.g.u/Th.atoms.g)^2 + (L232*Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE/2)^2)) %>%
  mutate(D.u = case_when(Sm.ppm == 0 ~ 0,
                         .default = 6*Sm.atoms.g*(exp(L147*Pb207.Pb206_Date*10^6)-1)*
           sqrt((Sm.a.g.u/Sm.atoms.g)^2 + (L147*Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE/2)^2))) %>%
  # uncertainty
  mutate(Max.Alpha.Dose.1s = sqrt(A.u^2 + B.u^2 + C.u^2 + D.u^2)) %>%
  # delete components of uncertainty calculation
  select(!c(A.u, B.u, C.u, D.u))
```
```{r Fig. 2. combined density plots, echo = F}
binwidth = 30
# define density functions
# new data
upb_density <- density(all_data$Pb207.Pb206_Date, bw = binwidth)
upb_density.fun <- data.frame("x" = unlist(upb_density[[1]]), "y" = unlist(upb_density[[2]]))
peak1 <- data.frame("x" = upb_density.fun[which(upb_density.fun == max(upb_density.fun$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(upb_density.fun$y))
peak2 <- data.frame("x" = upb_density.fun[which(upb_density.fun == max(upb_density.fun[upb_density.fun$x > 1700, ]$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(upb_density.fun[upb_density.fun$x > 1700, ]$y))
peak3 <- data.frame("x" = upb_density.fun[which(upb_density.fun == max(upb_density.fun[upb_density.fun$x > 2500, ]$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(upb_density.fun[upb_density.fun$x > 2500, ]$y))
# malone data
malone_density <- density(malone_data_comp$X206Pb..207Pb..age, bw = binwidth)
malone_density.fun <- data.frame("x" = unlist(malone_density[[1]]), "y" = unlist(malone_density[[2]]))
peak1m <- data.frame("x" = malone_density.fun[which(malone_density.fun == max(malone_density.fun$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(malone_density.fun$y))
peak2m <- data.frame("x" = malone_density.fun[which(malone_density.fun == max(malone_density.fun[malone_density.fun$x > 1700, ]$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(malone_density.fun[malone_density.fun$x > 1700, ]$y))
peak3m <- data.frame("x" = malone_density.fun[which(malone_density.fun == max(malone_density.fun[malone_density.fun$x > 2500, ]$y), arr.ind=TRUE)[1], 1], "y" = max(malone_density.fun[malone_density.fun$x > 2500, ]$y))


p.density.c <- 
  ggplot() +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .2, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .2, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  geom_density(data = malone_data_comp, aes(x = X206Pb..207Pb..age), bw = binwidth, fill = "transparent", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6, adjust = 2) +   # kernal density
  geom_rug(data = all_data, aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date), alpha = 0.4, outside = FALSE, color = "black") +
  geom_rug(data = malone_data_comp, aes(x = X206Pb..207Pb..age), alpha = 0.4, sides = "b", outside = TRUE, color = "blue") +
   geom_density(data = all_data, aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date), bw = binwidth, fill = "transparent", adjust = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(500, 3000) +
  xlab("207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)") +
  ylab("Density") +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.003, label = "U/Pb This Study", colour =  "black", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.0028, label = paste("n =", nrow(all_data)), colour =  "black", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text",x = 2000, y = 0.0022, label = paste("Kernel Binwidth =", round(upb_density$bw,2), "Myr"), colour = "black", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x=1395-200, y = 0.0021, label = paste(signif(peak1[1], 3)), colour = "black") +
  annotate("text", x  = 1852+200, y = 0.0006, label = paste(signif(peak2[1], 3)), colour = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = 2700, y = 0.0002, label = paste(signif(peak3[1], 3)), colour = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.0026, label = "U/Pb Malone et al. (2020)", colour =  "gray", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 2000, y = 0.0024, label = paste("n =", nrow(malone_data_comp)), colour =  "gray", hjust = 0) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
p.density.c
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.1_UPb.pdf", plot = p.density.c, width = 6.5, height = 2)
```
```{r U-Pb K-S test}
# compare Malone data and new data
ks <- ks.test(x = all_data$Pb207.Pb206_Date, y = malone_data_comp$X206Pb..207Pb..age, alternative = "two.sided")
print(ks$p.value)
```
```{r ZHe for plotting, echo = FALSE}
# sort and group data for plotting
ZHe_plot_data <- all_data %>%
  drop_na(He4.fmol) %>%
  filter(is.na(Rejection.Reason)) %>%
  mutate(Max.Alpha.Dose = Max.Alpha.Dose/(10^(16))) %>%
  mutate(Max.Alpha.Dose.1s = Max.Alpha.Dose.1s/(10^(16))) %>%
  mutate(Age_Group = case_when(Pb207.Pb206_Date < 1600 ~ "1360 Ma",
                               Pb207.Pb206_Date > 2500 ~ "2640 Ma",
                               .default = "1860 Ma")) %>%
  mutate(Age_Group = factor(Age_Group, levels = c("1360 Ma", "1860 Ma", "2640 Ma"))) %>%
  mutate(Opacity = case_when(ZHe.Report < 100 ~ "transparent",
                             .default = "opaque")) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report)) %>%
  mutate(FT_date_plot.1s = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F ~ Corrected.Date.No.FT.Inheritance.Analytical.Uncertainty.1s,
                                  .default = ZHe.Report.1s)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied.Extra = case_when(is.na(Corrected_Date.No.FT.Inheritance) == F  & Fragment == "No" ~ "Since Deposition Only",
                                .default = FT.Applied)) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied.Extra = factor(FT.Applied.Extra, levels = c("None", "Conventional", "Since Deposition Only"))) %>%
  mutate(FT.Applied = factor(FT.Applied, levels = c("None", "Conventional")))
age_n <- ZHe_plot_data %>% # count number in each age group irrespective of FT applied
  count(Age_Group) %>%
  rename("age_n_all" = "n")
age_n_ft <- ZHe_plot_data %>% # count number in each age group only grains with FT
  filter(FT.Applied != "None") %>%
  count(Age_Group) %>%
  rename("age_n_ft" = "n")
FT.Applied_n <- ZHe_plot_data %>% # count number in each group of type of FT applied
  count(FT.Applied.Extra) %>%
  rename("n_ft_type" = "n")

ZHe_plot_data <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  full_join(age_n, by = "Age_Group") %>%
  full_join(age_n_ft, by = "Age_Group") %>%
  full_join(FT.Applied_n, by = "FT.Applied.Extra")

color_scale <- "D"
color_breaks <- c(1, 10, 100, 1000)
color_limits <- c(1, 1000)
color_trans <- "log"
```
```{r Fig. S1 ZHe vs. eU plot, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_eU <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = eU, y = ZHe.Report, xmin = eU - eU.1s, xmax = eU + eU.1s, ymin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, ymax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "x") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = color_trans, option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks, name = "Max Alpha\nDose\n(x1016 a/g)") +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 2000, y = 1600, label = paste("n = ", age_n_all)), colour = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("None" = 15, "Conventional" = 16), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "eU\n(ppm)", limits=c(0, 2500), breaks = seq(0, 2500, 500)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 1800), breaks = seq(0, 1800, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "right") +
  facet_wrap(vars(Age_Group), nrow = 3)

ZHe_eU
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.S2eU_2026_01_21.pdf", plot = ZHe_eU, width = 3.75, height = 5.5)
```
```{r Fig. S1 ZHe vs. alpha plot, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_alpha <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Max.Alpha.Dose, y = ZHe.Report, xmin = Max.Alpha.Dose - Max.Alpha.Dose.1s, xmax = Max.Alpha.Dose + Max.Alpha.Dose.1s, ymin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, ymax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "x") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = color_trans, option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks, name = "Max Alpha\nDose\n(x1016 a/g)") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 800, y = 1600, label = paste("n = ", age_n_all)), colour = "black") +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("None" = 15, "Conventional" = 16), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Max Alpha Dose\n(x1016 a/g)", limits=c(0, 1000), breaks = seq(0, 1000, 200)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 1800), breaks = seq(0, 1800, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "right") +
  facet_wrap(vars(Age_Group), nrow = 3)

ZHe_alpha
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.S2alpha_2026_01_21.pdf", plot = ZHe_alpha, width = 3.75, height = 5.5)
```
```{r Fig. S1 ZHe vs. RFT, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_RFT <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  filter(FT.Applied == "Conventional") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = RFT, y = ZHe.Report, xmin = RFT - RFT.1s, xmax = RFT + RFT.1s, ymin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, ymax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "x") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = "C", transform = "log", limits = c(10, 2000), breaks = c(10, 100, 1000), name = "eU (ppm)") +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = color_trans, option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks, name = "Max Alpha\nDose\n(x1016 a/g)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", limits = c(5, 780), name = "Max Alpha Dose (a/g x 10^16)") +
  #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks) +
   #scale_color_viridis(option = color_scale, limits = c(0, 800), breaks = seq(0, 800, 100)) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 175, y = 1600, label = paste("n = ", age_n_ft)), colour = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("None" = 15, "Conventional" = 16), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "FT-Equivalent\nSpherical Radius (µm)", limits=c(0, 200), breaks = seq(0, 200, 25)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 1800), breaks = seq(0, 1800, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "right") +
  facet_wrap(vars(Age_Group), nrow = 3)

ZHe_RFT

#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.S2RFT_2026_01_21.pdf", plot = ZHe_RFT, width = 3.75, height = 5.5)
```

```{r Fig. 3 ZHe vs. UPb plot Main Paper, echo = FALSE}
td <- (992.51+0.64 - (((992.51 + 0.64) - (985.5- 35.8))/2)) *10^6 # maximum depositonal age in yr
td.unc <- (((992.51 + 0.64) - (985.5- 35.8))/2) *10^6 # unvertainty on depositional age in yr
ZHe_UPb <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date, y = ZHe.Report, xmin = Pb207.Pb206_Date - Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, xmax = Pb207.Pb206_Date + Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, ymin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, ymax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, shape = FT.Applied, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", xmin = 1800, xmax = 2000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  # y axis
  annotate("rect", ymin = 980, ymax = 1010, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1020, ymax = 1090, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1070, ymax = 1110, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1140, ymax = 1190, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1200, ymax = 1250, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1300, ymax = 1360, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1340, ymax = 1370, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1380, ymax = 1520, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1600, ymax = 1700, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1820, ymax = 1880, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  # annotate("rect", ymin = 1800, ymax = 2000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
  #              alpha = .1, fill = "green") + # Trans Hudson Orogen from west or recycled
  annotate("rect", ymin = 2700, ymax = 3000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior
  annotate("rect", xmax = Inf, xmin = - Inf, ymin = 985.5-35.8, ymax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1,  linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "x") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks, name = "Max Alpha\nDose\n(x1016 a/g)") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("None" = 15, "Conventional" = 16), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 3500), breaks = seq(0, 3000, 500)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 2400), breaks = seq(0, 2000, 200)) + 
  geom_text(aes(x = 200, y = 2000, label = paste("n = ", nrow(ZHe_plot_data))), colour = "black") +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "none")

ZHe_UPb
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.3_2026_01_21.pdf", plot = ZHe_UPb, width = 4, height = 4)
```
```{r density plots for Fig 3, echo = F}
upb.density.3 <- 
  ggplot() +
   geom_density(data = all_data, aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date), bw = binwidth, fill = "black", alpha = 0.6, adjust = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(0, 3000) +
  xlab("207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)") +
  ylab("Density") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
upb.density.3
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R.Fig.3upb.pdf", plot = upb.density.3, width = 4, height = 2)

zhe.density.3 <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  ggplot() +
   geom_density(aes(x = ZHe.Report), bw = binwidth, fill = "transparent", alpha = 0.6, adjust = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(0, 2000) +
  xlab("ZHe Date (Ma)") +
  ylab("Density") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
zhe.density.3
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.3zhe.pdf", plot = zhe.density.3, width = 4, height = 2)
```

```{r Fig. S2 ZHe vs. UPb plot Ft consideration, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_UPb_FT <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Pb207.Pb206_Date, y = FT_date_plot, xmin = Pb207.Pb206_Date - Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, xmax = Pb207.Pb206_Date + Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, ymin = FT_date_plot - FT_date_plot.1s, ymax = FT_date_plot + FT_date_plot.1s, shape = FT.Applied.Extra, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  # y axis
    annotate("rect", ymin = 980, ymax = 1010, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1020, ymax = 1090, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1070, ymax = 1110, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1140, ymax = 1190, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1200, ymax = 1250, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1300, ymax = 1360, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1340, ymax = 1370, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1380, ymax = 1520, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1600, ymax = 1700, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1820, ymax = 1880, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  annotate("rect", ymin = 2700, ymax = 3000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior
  annotate("rect", xmax = Inf, xmin = - Inf, ymin = 985.5-35.8, ymax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1,  linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "x") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("None" = 15, "Conventional" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "207Pb/206Pb Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 3500), breaks = seq(0, 3000, 500)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date (Ma)", limits=c(0, 2400), breaks = seq(0, 2000, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "none")

ZHe_UPb_FT
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.S3_2026_01_21.pdf", plot = ZHe_UPb_FT, width = 4, height = 4)
```
```{r Fig. S2 ZHe_FT vs. ZHe plot consideration, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_FT_comp <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  filter(FT.Applied.Extra == "Since Deposition Only") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ZHe.Report, y = FT_date_plot, xmin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, xmax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, ymin = FT_date_plot - FT_date_plot.1s, ymax = FT_date_plot + FT_date_plot.1s, shape = FT.Applied.Extra, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1340, xmax = 1370, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1380, xmax = 1520, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1600, xmax = 1700, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1820, xmax = 1880, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  annotate("rect", xmin = 2700, xmax = 3000, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior Province from N
  # y axis
  annotate("rect", ymin = 980, ymax = 1010, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1020, ymax = 1090, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1070, ymax = 1110, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1140, ymax = 1190, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1200, ymax = 1250, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1300, ymax = 1360, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1340, ymax = 1370, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # SGGRP south
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1380, ymax = 1520, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + # EGGRP from south + east
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1600, ymax = 1700, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Mazatzal, from west
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1820, ymax = 1880, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Penokean from S and E
  annotate("rect", ymin = 2700, ymax = 3000, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#225555") + # Superior
  annotate("rect", xmax = Inf, xmin = - Inf, ymin = 985.5-35.8, ymax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1,  linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "x") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 1000, y = 1600, label = paste("n = ", n_ft_type)), color = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("None" = 15, "Conventional" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "ZHe Date, Normal FT Correction (Ma)", limits=c(900, 1700), breaks = seq(900, 1700, 200)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "ZHe Date, FT Correction Since Deposition Only (Ma)", limits=c(900, 1700), breaks = seq(900, 1700, 200)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "none")

ZHe_FT_comp
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.S3_inset_2026_01_21.pdf", plot = ZHe_FT_comp, width = 2.47, height = 1.6)
```
```{r Fig. S2 ZHe density plot supplement}
zhe.density.ft <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  ggplot() +
   geom_density(aes(x = FT_date_plot), bw = binwidth, fill = "black", alpha = 0.6, adjust = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(0, 2000) +
  xlab("ZHe Date (Ma)") +
  ylab("Density") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
zhe.density.ft
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.S3zhe.pdf", plot = zhe.density.ft, width = 4, height = 2)
```
```{r Fig. S2 ZHe_FT vs. ZHe plot consideration zoomed in, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_FT_comp_zoom <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  filter(FT.Applied.Extra == "Since Deposition Only") %>%
  filter(ZHe.Report < 1300) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ZHe.Report, y = FT_date_plot, xmin = ZHe.Report - ZHe.Report.1s, xmax = ZHe.Report + ZHe.Report.1s, ymin = FT_date_plot - FT_date_plot.1s, ymax = FT_date_plot + FT_date_plot.1s, shape = FT.Applied.Extra, colour =  Max.Alpha.Dose, alpha = Opacity)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 980, xmax = 1010, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1020, xmax = 1090, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1070, xmax = 1110, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1140, xmax = 1190, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1200, xmax = 1250, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1300, xmax = 1360, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  # y axis
  annotate("rect", ymin = 980, ymax = 1010, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Rigolet
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1020, ymax = 1090, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#997700") + # Ottawan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1070, ymax = 1110, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .3, fill = "#72190E") + # MCR
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1140, ymax = 1190, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Shawinigan
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1200, ymax = 1250, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#997700") + # Elezevirian
  annotate("rect", ymin = 1300, ymax = 1360, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               alpha = .1, fill = "#332288") + #Pre-Elzevierian
  annotate("rect", xmax = Inf, xmin = - Inf, ymin = 985.5-35.8, ymax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1,  linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "x") +
  geom_errorbar(lineend = "square", orientation = "y") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis(trans = "log", option = color_scale, limits = color_limits, breaks = color_breaks) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("None" = 15, "Conventional" = 16, "Since Deposition Only" = 17), name = "FT Applied") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("transparent" = 0.4, "opaque" = 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "ZHe Date, Conventional FT Correction (Ma)", limits=c(900, 1300), breaks = seq(900, 1300, 100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = paste("ZHe Date FR Correction", "Since Deposition Only (Ma)", sep = "\n"), limits=c(900, 1300), breaks = seq(900, 1300, 100)) + 
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 0.75),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.75),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "none")

ZHe_FT_comp_zoom
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.S3_zoom_2026_01_21.pdf", plot = ZHe_FT_comp_zoom, width = 6.5, height = 3)
```
```{r Fig. S2 ZHe cumulative density function plot, echo = FALSE}
ZHe_cdf_data <- ZHe_plot_data %>%
  filter(Fragment == "No") %>%
  select(c(Run, Sample, Grain, Fragment, Uncorrected.Date, ZHe.Report, FT_date_plot, FT.Applied.Extra))  %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Uncorrected.Date, ZHe.Report, FT_date_plot), names_to = "Date_Type", values_to = "Date") %>%
  mutate("FT_cor" = case_when(Date_Type == "Uncorrected.Date" ~ "None",
                              Date_Type == "ZHe.Report" ~ "Conventional (Entire History)",
                              .default = "Since Deposition Only")) %>%
  mutate(FT_cor = factor(FT_cor, levels = c("None", "Conventional (Entire History)", "Since Deposition Only")))

### KS tests ----
ft_none <- ZHe_cdf_data %>%
  filter(Date_Type == "Uncorrected.Date")
ft_conventional <- ZHe_cdf_data %>%
  filter(Date_Type == "ZHe.Report")
ft_deposition <- ZHe_cdf_data %>%
  filter(Date_Type == "FT_date_plot")
ks_none <- ks.test(x = ft_conventional$Date, y = ft_none$Date, alternative = "two.sided")
ks_deposition <- ks.test(x = ft_conventional$Date, y = ft_deposition$Date, alternative = "two.sided")

zhe_cdf <- ZHe_cdf_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, group = FT_cor, color = FT_cor)) +
  annotate("rect", ymax = Inf, ymin = - Inf, xmin = 985.5-35.8, xmax = 992.51 + 0.64, fill = "#437DBF", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 992.51, linewidth = 0.5, color = "#437DBF") +
  stat_ecdf() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  xlim(00, 2000) +
  xlab("ZHe Date (Ma)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("None" = "gray", "Conventional (Entire History)" = "black", "Since Deposition Only" = "red"), name = "FT Correction") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Cumulative Distribution Function", labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.001)) +
  annotate("text", x = 1200, y = 0.26, label = paste("n =", nrow(ZHe_cdf_data)/nlevels(ZHe_cdf_data$FT_cor), sep = " "), colour =  "black", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 1200, y = 0.20, label = paste("K-S p-value =", signif(ks_none$p.value, 2)), colour =  "gray", hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 1200, y = 0.14, label = paste("K-S p-value =", signif(ks_deposition$p.value, 2)), colour =  "red", hjust = 0) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.75,0.5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.title = element_text(size=12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11))
zhe_cdf

#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.S2C_2026_01_21.pdf", plot = zhe_cdf, width = 6.5, height = 3)
```

```{r load model results summary tables for Fig. 4, 5, S3, echo = FALSE}
Hft.con <- drop_na(read.csv("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Code/GitHub/Jacobsville-Sandstone/HeFTy_Constraint_Summary.csv")) %>%
  select(!c("X"))

Hft.con <- Hft.con %>%
  mutate(Sample = sub('z', '', Sample)) %>%
  mutate(Sample = sub('^\\D+(\\d)', '\\1', Sample)) %>%
  mutate(Sample = case_when(Sample == "1_74" ~ "1_074",
                            .default = Sample))

Hft.tT <- drop_na(read.csv("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Code/GitHub/Jacobsville-Sandstone/HeFTy_Paths_all.csv")) %>%
  select(!c("X"))

Hft.tT <- Hft.tT %>%
  mutate(Constraint = case_when(str_starts(Constraint, "Con") ~ paste("C", sub('.*Con', '', Constraint) , "Sub0", sep = ""),
                                .default = Constraint)) %>%
  mutate(Sample = sub('z', '', Sample)) %>%
  mutate(Sample = sub('^\\D+(\\d)', '\\1', Sample)) %>%
  mutate(Sample = case_when(Sample == "1_74" ~ "1_074",
                            .default = Sample))
```
```{r merge model table with data, echo = FALSE}
data.to.merge <- all_data %>%
  select(c(Run, Grain, Pb207.Pb206_Date, Pb207.Pb206_Date.2SE, eU, eU.1s,
           RSV, RSV.1s, RFT, RFT.1s, ZHe.Report, ZHe.Report.1s, FT.Applied, Rejection.Reason, Max.Alpha.Dose, Max.Alpha.Dose.1s)) %>%
  mutate(Grain.ch = case_when(Grain < 10 ~ paste("00", Grain, sep = ""),
                              between(Grain, 10, 99) ~ paste("0", Grain, sep = ""),
                              .default = paste(Grain))) %>%
  mutate(Sample = paste(Run, Grain.ch, sep = "_"))

tT.data <- left_join(Hft.tT, data.to.merge, by = "Sample")
```
```{r Fig. 4 and S3A plot model setup, echo = FALSE}
constraints <- Hft.con %>%
  select(c(HeFTy.ID, Max.time..Ma., Min.time..Ma., Max.temp..C.,
           Min.temp..C., Sample, Table.ID, Type)) %>%
  mutate(Max.time..Ma. = case_when(Table.ID == "1a" ~ 1500,
                                        Table.ID == "1a.1" ~ 1499.5,
                                        Table.ID == "1a.2" ~ 1499,
                                        .default = Max.time..Ma.)) %>%
  group_by(Type, Sample) %>%
  filter(Sample == "1_017")

cons.df <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:nrow(constraints)){
    df <- data.frame("Time" = c(constraints$Max.time..Ma.[i], constraints$Max.time..Ma.[i], constraints$Min.time..Ma.[i], constraints$Min.time..Ma.[i]), 
                     "Temp" = c(constraints$Max.temp..C.[i], constraints$Min.temp..C.[i], constraints$Min.temp..C.[i], constraints$Max.temp..C.[i]),
                     "HeFTy.ID" = constraints$HeFTy.ID[i], 
                     "Table.ID" = constraints$Table.ID[i],
                     "Type" = constraints$Type[i])
    cons.df <- rbind(cons.df, df) # combine data frames
}

cons.df <- cons.df %>%
  mutate(Con.Type = case_when(Table.ID == "1a" ~ "Crystallization",
                                            Table.ID == "2a" | Table.ID == "3a" | Table.ID == "3c" | Table.ID == "3c*" ~ "Surface",
                                            Table.ID == "2b" | Table.ID == "3b" ~ "Sedimentary Burial",
                                            .default = "Exploration Box"))

col_vals <- c("Crystallization" = "#ed5f5a", "Surface" = "#5b81b0" , "Sedimentary Burial" = "#fbae35", "Exploration Box" = "black")
line_vals <- c("Crystallization" = "solid", "Surface" = "solid", "Sedimentary Burial" = "dashed",
              "Exploration Box" = "dotted")
models <- cons.df %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Time, y = Temp, group = HeFTy.ID, colour = as.factor(Con.Type), fill = after_scale(colour), linetype = as.factor(Con.Type), label = Table.ID)) +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)", expand = c(0,0), breaks = seq(0, 1500, 150)) +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temperature (°C)", expand = c(0,0), breaks = seq(0, 1000, 200)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1500), ylim = c(0, 1000)) +
  geom_polygon(linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.3) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 485, xmax = 995, ymin = 0, ymax = 300, color = "black", fill = "transparent") +
  #geom_label(aes(x = mean(Time), y = mean(Temp), group = HeFTy.ID, label = Table.ID), colour = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Constraint Type", values = col_vals) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Constraint Type", values = line_vals) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "gray", linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 'dashed'),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_wrap(vars(as.factor(Type)), ncol = 1)
models

#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Fig.4_2026_03_09.pdf", plot = models, width = 3.25, height = 7)
```
```{r min and max temp determinations, echo = FALSE}
neo.envelopes <- tT.data %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(str_detect(Constraint, "C5")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Type, Constraint) %>%
  summarize(Type = unique(Type), Sample = unique(Sample), Constraint = unique(Constraint),
            Max.Temp = max(Temp), Max.Time = Time[which(Temp == max(Temp))],
            Min.Temp = min(Temp), Min.Time = Time[which(Temp == min(Temp))],
            .groups = "keep")

neo.points <- tT.data %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(str_detect(Constraint, "C5")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Type) %>%
  summarize(Type = unique(Type), Sample = unique(Sample),
            Max.Temp = max(Temp), Max.Time = Time[which(Temp == max(Temp))],
            Min.Temp = min(Temp), Min.Time = Time[which(Temp == min(Temp))],
            .groups = "keep") 

neo.max <- tT.data %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(str_detect(Constraint, "C5")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Type, Fit) %>%
  summarize(Type = unique(Type), Sample = unique(Sample), Fit = unique(Fit),
            Max.Temp = max(Temp), Max.Time = Time[which(Temp == max(Temp))],
            Min.Temp = min(Temp), Min.Time = Time[which(Temp == min(Temp))],
            .groups = "keep") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Sample, Type) %>%
  mutate(Family = case_when(all(Max.Temp < 140)  ~ "Required < PRZ",
                            all(Max.Temp < 220) & any(Max.Temp < 140) ~ "Required PRZ or <",
                            all(Max.Temp > 140) ~ "Required PRZ or >",
                            .default = "Permissive")) %>%
  mutate(Family_fac = factor(Family, levels = c("Permissive", "Required PRZ or >", "Required PRZ or <")))
  
```
```{r Fig. 5 and S3B plot max neoproterozic heating model compilation grouped, echo = F}
# individual density plots for each group of detrital zircon with shared tT behavior overlain in adobe illustrator
paths.limited <- neo.max
n_family <- paths.limited %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Type) %>%
  count(Family_fac) %>%
  mutate(n = n/1001)

# permissive dates
all.paths.Permissive <- paths.limited %>%
  filter(Family_fac == "Permissive") %>%
  ggplot() +
  stat_density_2d(aes(x = Max.Time, y = Max.Temp, fill = ..level..), contour_var = "ndensity",
                  geom = "polygon",
                  alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = c("#2CA02C","white")) +
  geom_polygon(data = cons.df, aes(x = Time, y = Temp, group = HeFTy.ID, colour = as.factor(Con.Type), linetype = as.factor(Con.Type)), fill = "transparent", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = col_vals) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = line_vals) +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)", limits = c(1060, 460), breaks = seq(1060, 460, -100)) +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temperature (°C)", limits = c(300, 0), breaks = seq(300, 0, -20)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(vars(as.factor(Type)), ncol  = 1)
all.paths.Permissive
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Max.Heating.Permissive.pdf", all.paths.Permissive, dpi = 300, width = 3.25, height = 7)

# dates that require cooler temps
all.paths.Cool <- paths.limited %>%
  filter(Family_fac == "Required PRZ or <") %>%
  ggplot() +
  stat_density_2d(aes(x = Max.Time, y = Max.Temp, fill = ..level..), contour_var = "ndensity",
                  geom = "polygon",
                  alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = c("#1F77B4","white")) +
  geom_polygon(data = cons.df, aes(x = Time, y = Temp, group = HeFTy.ID, colour = as.factor(Con.Type), linetype = as.factor(Con.Type)), fill = "transparent", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = col_vals) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = line_vals) +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)", limits = c(1060, 460), breaks = seq(1060, 460, -100)) +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temperature (°C)", limits = c(300, 0), breaks = seq(300, 0, -20)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(vars(as.factor(Type)), ncol  = 1)
all.paths.Cool
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Max.Heating.Cool.pdf", all.paths.Cool, dpi = 300, width = 3.25, height = 7)

# dates that require hotter temps
all.paths.Hot <- paths.limited %>%
  filter(Family_fac == "Required PRZ or >") %>%
  ggplot() +
  stat_density_2d(aes(x = Max.Time, y = Max.Temp, fill = ..level..), contour_var = "ndensity",
                  geom = "polygon",
                  alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = c("#E73F74","white")) +
  geom_polygon(data = cons.df, aes(x = Time, y = Temp, group = HeFTy.ID, colour = as.factor(Con.Type), linetype = as.factor(Con.Type)), fill = "transparent", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = col_vals) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = line_vals) +
  scale_x_reverse(name = "Time (Ma)", limits = c(1060, 460), breaks = seq(1060, 460, -100)) +
  scale_y_reverse(name = "Temperature (°C)", limits = c(300, 0), breaks = seq(300, 0, -20)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = "transparent", linewidth = 1),
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(-0.2,"cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0,0,0,0), "mm"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(vars(as.factor(Type)), ncol  = 1)
all.paths.Hot
#ggsave("/Users/barrapeak/Dropbox/Thermo-Detrital/2025/Manuscript/R_Figure_Outputs/R.Model.Max.Heating.Hot.pdf", all.paths.Hot, dpi = 300, width = 3.25, height = 7)
```
